data.title: Java Full Stack Developer
data.summary: Role: Sr. Java Full Stack Developer Location: Malvern, PA Contact: Long-Term, (W2 only) Experience: 10+ years Skills: AWS, Java, Angular, Spring, Hibernate, Oracle Database Overview We are seeking an experienced AWS Software Developer specializing in development of full stack Java/J2EE application(s) on AWS stack. The ideal candidate will possess a sound understanding of AWS cloud services, having hands-on development experience with Java/J2EE application architecture and Angular frameworks.

data.title: Java Full Stack Developer (Angular)
data.summary: Job#: 3033438 Java Full Stack Developer (Angular) Location: Charlotte, North Carolina (Hybrid) Employment Type: Contract Duration: 12 months Role Overview An opportunity is available for an Angular + Java Full Stack Developer to design, develop, and maintain end-to-end web applications. This position involves creating responsive front-end user interfaces using Angular and developing robust back-end services in Java.

data.title: Java Fullstack Developer ( local only)
data.summary: Need Sr Java Fullstack Developer McLean VA - Hybrid Need only local Strong proficiency in Java (8+) and/or Python. Solid understanding of core language concepts. Strong experience building and consuming RESTful APIs. Experience with backend frameworks Spring Core, Spring MVC, Spring Boot, Spring Security, Spring Data.

data.title: Sr. Java Full Stack Developer
data.summary: Senior Java Full Stack Developer Full-Time (Direct Hire) Dallas, TX Position Overview We are seeking a Senior Java Full Stack Developer to design, build, and deliver scalable enterprise applications. Design, develop, and maintain APIs, microservices, and backend services. Build scalable API features and collaborate across development teams.

data.title: Senior Java Full Stack Developer
data.summary: In this role supporting our client, a leading organization in the financial services industry, you will contribute to the design, development, and delivery of scalable, secure, and high-performing applications in a cloud-first (AWS) environment. We partner with 15 of the top 20 banks globally.

data.title: Sr. Java Full Stack Developer
data.summary: Sr. Java Full Stack Developer Dallas, Texas Onsite. Lead and mentor a team of developers to deliver high-quality solutions. Drive architecture and design of microservices-based applications. Develop and maintain applications using Java, Spring Boot, and modern front-end frameworks. Provide technical guidance on Kafka, MongoDB, and container platforms.

data.title: Java Full stack Developer - AWS
data.summary: Java Full stack Developer with AWS Reston, VA Onsite/Hybrid: 5 Days. Mandatory: 8 years of experience in Design and Development of applications using Java 8+/J2EE, Spring, Spring-Boot, RESTful Services and UI Framework. 3 years of experience in design and development of Microservice using Spring-Boot and REST API. Strong knowledge in ORM Framework - JPA / Hibernate. Good knowledge in Docker and Kubernetes.

data.title: Java Full Stack Developer - Phoenix, AZ / New York, NY / (Hybrid)
data.summary: American Express is looking for a Java Full Stack Developer to design, develop, and scale enterprise-grade applications supporting global financial systems. Design and develop scalable applications using Java (Spring Boot / Microservices).

data.title: Java fullstack developer
data.summary: Position: Full Stack Engineer Location: San Francisco, CA (Onsite) - Need only locals Direct client F2F Interview Job Description: We are looking for a highly skilled Full Stack Engineer with strong experience in Java Microservices, Kafka-based event streaming and modern Data Engineering platforms.

data.title: Senior Full Stack Java Developer
data.summary: FULL TIME ONLY Tampa, FL Core Backend Java (Core Java, Java 8/11+) Spring Framework (Spring Boot, Spring MVC, Spring Security) Hibernate / JPA RESTful Web Services. Frontend Angular / React. Microservices architecture. Messaging: Kafka / RabbitMQ / JMS. Database RDBMS: Oracle / PostgreSQL / MySQL.

data.title: Full Stack Java Developer
data.summary: Grow your career as a Full Stack Java Developer with an innovative global bank in Irving, TX. Contract role with strong possibility of extension and/or conversion. Will require working a hybrid schedule 2-3 days onsite per week.

data.title: Full Stack Java Developer, $60/Hr on C2C, Sunrise, FL, Onsite Project
data.summary: Core Java, SOLID, OOP, REST API foundation. Java 17 streams, lambda, threads. Spring frameworks Spring Boot, Hibernate, Spring MVC, Spring AOP, Spring Web Flux, Spring Batch, Spring Security. Skilled in secure API integrations using Spring Security, OAuth2, JWT, and RBAC.

data.title: Full stack Java Developer(Frontend)
data.summary: Title: Full stack Java Developer(Frontend) Location: Remote Duration: Long term Contract on W2. More geared towards Node, React, and Next. So true full stack experience with JavaScript, and Java. Frontend & Backend full stack development using the latest frameworks. API development and Integration.

data.title: Application Developer Java Full Stack with Quarkus - Remote
data.summary: US Application Developer Java Full Stack with Quarkus Location: Remote from east coast. Very strong experience in Java (latest LTS), Quarkus, Azure SQL (SQL Server), RESTful APIs Springboot & React JS. Technical specification, design, and code reviews.

data.title: Senior Java Developer ----- Full time
data.summary: Location: Baltimore, MD Onsite Full time Java Full stack Developer. Design and develop software applications using Twelve-Factor App methodology. Design and develop applications using Kafka, Java, REST API and spring boot. Design and develop Microservices using Spring Boot, Java and RESTful architecture.

data.title: Sr Full Stack Developer - Java / AI
data.summary: A tech-focused insurance agency in Massachusetts is hiring a Senior Full Stack developer for their team. As a Full Stack developer, you'll be a point person for scaling out the company's existing product as well as designing modern applications.

data.title: Java Developer
data.summary: Title: Java Full Stack Developer Location: Phoenix, AZ & NYC. Need - EX-IBMer Skills: Java full stack with strong microservices, react.JS experience and similar 6 plus years of hands-on experience.

data.title: Full Stack Developer
data.summary: Title: Java Full-Stack Developer Location: Wilmington DE Contract to hire. 5-6 years of professional software development experience. Experience developing applications using Java. data.title: java developer with react
data.summary: Title: Java Full Stack Developer (React & Spring Boot Microservices) Location: San Leandro, CA In-person Interview Must. We are seeking a highly skilled Full Stack Java Developer with a strong frontend focus on React and deep expertise in Spring Boot based microservices.

data.title: Experienced Software Engineer Java / Python (Full Stack or Back End)
data.summary: Push the limits of what's possible with us as an experienced member of our Software Engineering team. As an Experienced Software Engineer at JPMorganChase within the Global Technology team, you serve as member of an agile team to design and deliver trusted market-leading technology products in a secure, stable, and scalable way.

data.title: Experienced Java & C# Automated Tester
data.summary: Apex Systems is seeking a Experienced Java & C# Automated Tester based out of Everett, WA. Location: Everett, WA (Hybrid). Lead test planning, developing test procedures, and managing the execution of automated tests.
